hooks.command: filepath=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$filepath" ]; then case "$filepath" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.css) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx biome format --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.rs) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/src-tauri" && cargo fmt -- --quiet 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; fi

filepath=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$filepath" ]; then case "$filepath" in *.env|*credentials*|*secret*) echo 'BLOCKED: Refusing to modify sensitive file' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi
